current.summary: Removed ACP spec from project, redesigned content-type distribution with skills frontmatter instead of sidecar model

activeWork.description: Content-type distribution and provenance redesign, removing ACP dependency and pivoting to Agent Ecosystem schema for skills
activeWork.progress: COMPLETED: ACP audit (no CLI integration found), deleted acp-spec.md and CHANGELOG.md, moved provenance.md to archive, rewrote design doc with Agent Ecosystem schema for skills. NEXT: Commit changes, resolve 5 open questions in design doc, design hooks/MCP manifest format with inline metadata

recentDecisions: Remove ACP entirely from project — was documented but not integrated into CLI or core functionality
Adopt Agent Ecosystem schema for skills frontmatter: license_name, license_url, copyright_holder, expectations (software/services/environments/os), supported_agent_platforms, integrations
Move ACP design docs to archive/ for historical reference rather than deletion
Redesign distribution model: frontmatter-based provenance for skills/rules/hooks/MCP, no sidecar files
nextSteps: git add and commit ACP removal + design doc rewrite
bd sync to push to remote

Review 5 open questions in skills section of design doc: semver vs integer versioning, metadata wrapper key naming, schema URL location, expectations enforcement scope, platform compatibility checking
Make stakeholder decision on skills frontmatter schema
Update SKILL.md spec with finalized schema
Design hooks/MCP manifest format (wrap hook.json/mcp.json in meta.yaml with provenance and requires/recommends)

context.notes: User received feedback indicating ACP approach was overcomplicated. Decided to pivot entirely: remove ACP, adopt simpler Agent Ecosystem schema for skills frontmatter, redesign distribution model around content type storage patterns. Design doc updated to reflect new direction with 5 open questions needing stakeholder input. No implementation code written yet—pure specification/design phase. Beads database shows untracked skill content directories (content/skills/*) from earlier work; these are unrelated to current session.
